description: Detects weak cryptography in Java: MessageDigest.getInstance('MD5'/'SHA-1'), Cipher.getInstance('ECB'), Math.random, timing-unsafe String.equals. JSON version matches all method invocations (cannot filter by object or argument content without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Method invocation detected -- verify this is not MessageDigest.getInstance with MD5/SHA-1, Cipher.getInstance with ECB mode, or timing-unsafe String.equals on secret values
